name: Grid View
notes: Virtualized thumbnail grid with scroll-direction-aware prefetch cache. Renders images with variable size/gap. Core view for browsing library.

name: Loupe View
notes: Full-image inspection with pan/zoom, crop tool, histogram (luma/RGB), generation metadata (prompt/model/seed), detection overlays, NSFW blur toggle.

name: Compare View
notes: Side-by-side image comparison. Supports selected pair or adjacent images. Swappable sides. Keyboard navigation and presentation modes.

name: Canvas View
notes: Spatial layout of selected/saved canvas items. Canvas types: gallery, notes, proof. Supports zoom/pan/drag. Persisted layout state.

name: Lineage View
notes: View related generation runs (siblings/children). Shows AI metadata and hierarchical lineage. Generation run browser.

name: Embeddings Explorer
notes: 2D/3D CLIP embedding projection (t-SNE/UMAP). Visual cluster exploration. Hover selection. Model download UI. Largest view component.

name: Speed Review (Tinder View)
notes: Fast accept/reject/skip card-swipe interface. Keyboard-driven triage. Rapid decision capture.

name: Export View
notes: Render export slides to PNG/PDF. Templates: bleed, editorial, terminal. Preset-driven (IG carousel, etc). Launch with Cmd+Enter.

name: Publish View (Static Site)
notes: Static site generation from canvas or selection. Scenarios: local preview, client review, agent handoff, static host. QR code + web stream.

name: Command Palette
notes: Universal fuzzy-search command launcher (Cmd+K). 50+ commands covering views, ratings, decisions, collections, workflows, export. Customizable hotkeys and aliases.

name: Sidebar Navigation
notes: Left panel with tabs: sessions, folders, collections, smart collections, detected objects, import/trash. Session switcher, canvas list, size filter.

name: Tab Bar (View Mode Selector)
notes: Top icon bar switching between grid/loupe/compare/canvas/lineage/embeddings/export/tinder/publish. Icons for each mode.

name: Status Bar
notes: Bottom 32px bar showing image count, selection stats, rating/decision hints, library stats.

name: Keyboard Shortcuts Dialog
notes: Customizable keyboard shortcut viewer. Browse, reset, remap commands. Shows conflicts. Persists to localStorage.

name: Context Menu
notes: Right-click menu for grid/loupe/compare. Open, rename, move, share, reveal in Finder, open with app, rating/decision toggles.

name: Thumbnail Component
notes: Grid cell rendering image preview, selection state, rating stars, decision icon, zoom-on-hover. Supports drag-select.

name: Star Rating System
notes: 0-5 star rating via chord (Shift+* then digit) or command palette. Per-session storage. Persisted to database.

name: Image Decision Tagging
notes: Accept/Reject/Undecided decision state. Keyboard shortcuts (A/R/U) or command palette. Persisted to database.

name: Undo/Redo
notes: Undo/Redo for ratings, decisions, collection adds, moves. Cmd+Z/Cmd+Shift+Z. Displays action label in toast.

name: Selection & Multi-Select
notes: Space to select, Shift+click range, Cmd+click individual. Selection state in store. Used by export/collect/canvas.

name: Grid Customization (Size/Gap)
notes: Adjust thumbnail size (80-400px) and gap. Persisted to store. Keyboard shortcuts (Cmd+- / Cmd+=).

name: Collection Creation & Management
notes: Create collections from selection/unselected. Add images via dialog or collect mode. Delete collections. Persisted to database.

name: Collect Mode (Batch Add)
notes: Space-driven rapid collection building. Choose collection target, press Space per image. Status hints. Toggle with Cmd+B.

name: Smart Collections (NL Filters)
notes: Create smart collections via natural-language or rule builder (ratings, sources, orientation, format, recency). Filters apply in real-time.

name: Import Banner
notes: Drag-drop or File > Import folder/files. Progress indicator. Source detection (CLIP embeddings, metadata, C2PA).

name: Job Progress Panel
notes: Real-time progress for background jobs: embeddings, import, export. Cancellable. Floating panel, auto-dismiss on complete.

name: Generation Results Strip
notes: Horizontal scrolling strip of recent generation run results. Links to lineage view. Agent snapshot integration.

name: Export to Folder Dialog
notes: Batch export dialog with naming template, format conversion (JPEG/PNG/WebP), quality slider. Exports current scope.

name: Contact Sheet Export
notes: Render configurable contact sheet grid as PNG. Rows/cols, font size, border, metadata overlay. Uses html-to-image.

name: Delivery CSV Export
notes: Export CSV with rating, decision, client feedback. For delivery/proof workflows.

name: Client Favorite & Comments
notes: Store client feedback separate from curator ratings. Favorite toggle. Comment field. Visible in loupe and delivery CSV.

name: Best of Group Ranking
notes: Ranking dialog for similarity groups. Score-based recommendation. Select best per cluster.

name: Find Similar Images (CLIP)
notes: CLIP-based visual similarity. Returns top 30 similar. Embeds if needed. Updates search results.

name: Detection Boxes & Inspector
notes: DINOv2 object detection overlays on loupe. Toggle boxes and inspector panel. Cached detections.

name: Image Search (Filter Bar)
notes: NL search via / or Cmd+F. Creates temporary smart collection. Filters by metadata, ratings, decisions.

name: Command Bar (Search Presets)
notes: Filter bar above grid. Presets: approved, rejected, 5-star, unrated, untagged. Custom NL queries. Real-time filtering.

name: View Mode Cycling
notes: Tab and Shift+Tab cycle through view modes. Respects static publishing enabled.

name: Loupe Pan & Zoom
notes: Scroll to zoom, drag to pan. Cmd+0 to reset. Min/max scale. Persistent pan/zoom state.

name: Crop Tool
notes: Draw/move/resize crop box on loupe. 8-point handles. Sends crop to backend for save.

name: NSFW Blur Toggle
notes: Toggleable blur filter on loupe via menu. Settings persist.

name: Zen Mode (Fullscreen)
notes: Hide all chrome (tabbar, sidebar, statusbar). Shift+> toggle. Applies to all views.

name: Compare Presentation Mode
notes: Shift+> cycles: normal -> zen -> image-only. Presentation-friendly modes.

name: Export Presentation Mode
notes: Shift+> cycles: normal -> zen -> image-only in export view.

name: Modal Dialog System
notes: Generic modal overlay. Used for trash confirm, text input, collection target selection.

name: Text Input Dialog
notes: Generic text input modal for collection names, workflow names, comments, etc.

name: Trash Confirm Dialog
notes: Confirm before moving image to trash. Skip for session/always option.

name: Collection Target Dialog
notes: Choose existing or create new collection for collect mode.

name: Toast Notifications
notes: Floating toasts for success/warning/error/info. Auto-dismiss. Custom actions. Stacked position.

name: Update Banner & Manager
notes: Check for updates on launch. Banner with download/dismiss. GitHub release polling.

name: Preview Display Window
notes: Separate window for client review. Modes: image-only, client-review, metadata-review. Web stream + Always-on-top.

name: MCP Settings Panel
notes: Configure MCP server connections. Token management. Static publishing config. Privacy dashboard.

name: About Dialog
notes: App info, version, license, links. GitHub/Twitter/Discord links. Keyboard shortcuts hint.

name: Session Switcher
notes: Switch between folder-based work sessions. Shows image counts. Validates folder existence.

name: Session Timeline
notes: Timeline view of session snapshots. Quick access to past work states.

name: Prompt Resubmit Dialog
notes: Resubmit image generation prompts to external APIs (GPT, DALL-E). Preserves original settings.

name: Keyboard Shortcuts System
notes: Global keyboard event handling. Chord support (Shift+*). Integration with command palette hotkeys.

name: File Menu (Native Menu)
notes: Open file, open folder, recent files. Menu state updates via Tauri IPC.

name: Image Context Menu (Native)
notes: Open with app, reveal in Finder, rename, move, share, trash.

name: Agent Snapshots (MCP)
notes: Capture annotated view snapshots for agent analysis. Saves to local or clipboard. Manifest + PNGs.

name: Workflow Automation
notes: Capture recent command sequence as replayable workflow. Save/run workflows. Destructive step confirmation.

name: Import/Export (Cull Exchange)
notes: Full library backup/restore. Bundle format includes images, ratings, decisions, collections, metadata.

name: Deep Link Routing
notes: URI scheme handling for deep linking. Navigate to image/collection/session. Schema: cull://view/...

name: Privacy Dashboard
notes: View/manage data sharing with services. Audit log of MCP operations.

name: View State Persistence
notes: Save/restore view mode, zoom, pan, sidebar visibility, grid settings. 5-second auto-save.

name: Virtualized Image Loading
notes: Paginated loading (128 images/page). Lazy-load for current scope. Cache invalidation on import/trash.

name: Minimum Size Filter
notes: Filter images below minimum pixel dimension. Settings persist.

name: Show Missing Files Filter
notes: Toggle visibility of images with missing source files. Helps identify broken imports.

name: MCP Server (CullMcp)
notes: Unix socket server (mcp.sock) managing auth context, tool dispatch, and path redaction for remote vs local access. Async multi-connection handler with connection counting. Core dispatcher: call_tool() validates auth/capabilities/module enablement, logs all tool calls to audit trail.

name: Browse/Curate - Library & Collection Management
notes: 13 tools: 7 read (list/get), 6 write (rate/decide/manage collections). All support token scope filtering (folder/collection/tag level) and pagination. Rating validation (0-5), decision normalization (accept/reject/undecided). Scope-aware collection counts via scoped_collection_counts(). Tests: scope enforcement, pagination clamping, decision/rating validation.

name: Search & Quality - Image Analysis
notes: 7 tools: 4 read (detections/vision/quality), 3 async write (embeddings/detection/quality analysis). find_similar uses CLIP embeddings (clip-vit-b32/dinov2-vits14), returns cosine similarity scores. search_by_object requires prior object detection. get_quality_count supports scope (global vs scoped). Test coverage: path redaction for model provenance in mcp_model_download_response_includes_provenance test.

name: Import & Export
notes: 10 tools: 4 import (folder/files/rescan), 6 export/canvas. All import tools scope-checked by path/folder. Export tools redact publish paths for remote clients (site_dir, manifest_path, instructions_path). Canvas export filters items by token scope. rescan_sources is async job-based (100k image pagination). Tests: export_tools_map_to_export_read, import_tools_map_to_import_write, remote_safe_publish_value_redacts_path_bearing_strings.

name: Display & UI Navigation
notes: 9 tools: all local-only snapshot tools for agent view interaction (capture, get, select labels/images). Snapshot selection modes: replace/add/toggle with focus_first option. Clipboard monitor status exposed (running, collection_id, capture_dir, last_error). Tests: agent_snapshot_selection_mode_validation, display_tools_map_to_display_navigate, remote path redaction for clipboard status.

name: Publish & Clipboard
notes: 3 tools: clipboard publish spawns static site gen + local HTTP server binding. Redacts site_dir/manifest/instructions paths for remote clients. serve_static_publish_package is async, admin-only, requires module_static_publishing enabled. get_last_clipboard_publish retrieves cached result from settings. Tests: clipboard_publish_tool_is_module_gated, remote_clipboard_publish_value_redacts_local_paths.

name: AI & Model Processing
notes: 6 tools: 4 async background jobs (embeddings/detection/vision/quality), 2 metadata ops. Models: CLIP (clip-vit-b32), DINOv2 (dinov2-vits14), YOLO (nano/small/medium), Ollama vision. All spawned via state.jobs.create_job() with cancellation tokens. get_generation_run redacts prompt/metadata for remote tokens unless admin role. set_generation_metadata creates manual GenerationRun records. Tests: ai_tools_map_to_ai_run, scoped_generation_run_redacts_private_fields_by_default, local_generation_run_preserves_private_fields.

name: Job Management
notes: 3 admin-only tools. get_job retrieves job snapshot (status, progress, current_item). list_jobs returns running+recent terminal jobs. cancel_job sets status='cancelling', stops after current iteration. Tests: job_snapshot_serializes_correctly, job_snapshot_null_optional_fields, job_snapshot_with_error.

name: Token Management
notes: 4 token management tools (admin-only). create_token returns {token_id, secret} shown once only. Supports role (viewer/curator/operator/admin) and scope (folders/collections/tags). rotate_token invalidates old secret. revoke_token is permanent. list_tokens shows id/name/role/timestamps. Tests: token_tools_map_to_tokens_manage, token_scope_parsed_from_json, token_scope_empty_object, token_scope_none_when_no_json.

name: Audit & Logging
notes: 2 admin-only tools. get_audit_log retrieves recent entries (default 50, max 500) with id/token_id/tool_name/result_status/timestamp. prune_audit_log deletes entries older than N days (default 30). All tool calls logged via log_tool_call() with params_json and status={ok|error|denied|disabled}.

name: Voice Dictation (Command Bar)
notes: Native macOS speech-to-text dictation into the command bar with en-US/ru-RU locale toggle (CommandBar.svelte:399). Only covered indirectly via src/lib/tauri-command-contract.test.ts; no behavioral tests.

name: System Tray Icon & Menu
notes: Tray with show/hide, library stats, MCP connection count, clipboard monitor toggle, and a recording badge. 5 unit tests in tray.rs.

name: File Watcher & Cloud Storage Sync
notes: Live filesystem watching with move-intent registry, debounced sync queue, images:changed events, and iCloud/Dropbox/GoogleDrive eviction detection (watcher:cloud-eviction toast). 18 + 16 Rust tests.

name: Headless CLI
notes: Headless subcommand surface (import_folder, call_tool, download_embedding_model, generate_embeddings, analyze_image_quality, export, library tools). Strictly a CLI, not MCP, but it reuses the MCP tool layer via call_tool; schema has no cli value. ~30 tests in cli/mod.rs.

name: RAW File Support (module_raw)
notes: Opt-in RAW module (cr2/cr3/nef/arw/dng/orf/raf/rw2) with libraw decode plus a Fuji-specific path; toggled via module_raw setting in McpSettings. fuji.rs has 12 tests; libraw.rs untested.

name: Drag & Drop Import (Drop Overlay)
notes: Drop-to-import overlay in the main page; distinct from import_banner. Only a thin contract test (src/lib/drop-overlay-ux.test.ts, 16 lines).

name: Clipboard Monitor (Auto-Capture)
notes: The monitor itself (auto-capturing clipboard images into a collection, tray toggle, sidebar indicator) is missing from the inventory; only the MCP publish/status tools (publish-clipboard-group) are listed. Tests: src/lib/clipboard-monitor.test.ts, clipboard-monitor-ui.test.ts.

name: Native Menu Bar (App/Edit/Image/View/Window/Help)
notes: Inventory lists only file_menu and image_context_menu. Edit, Image, View (incl. Preview Display submenus at menu.rs:249-432), Window, and Help menus are missing. Tests: src/lib/menu.test.ts, native-view-menu-contract.test.ts, help-menu-contract.test.ts.

name: File Operations (Rename, Move to Folder, Reveal in Finder, Open With, Share)
notes: On-disk file management beyond the generic context_menu container: rename, move_image between folders, reveal in Finder, Open With application list, and macOS share sheet (shareImages). files.rs has 11 tests, move-menu-utils.test.ts exists; no tests for Open With/share UI.

name: OCR Text Extraction (Batch Job)
notes: start_ocr_batch is a registered Tauri command with a job type rendered in JobProgressPanel.svelte, but no frontend caller of startOcrBatch was found — appears dormant/orphaned. Likely feeds search_text/tag fields used by search presets and RuleBuilder. Only 2 tests in services/ocr.rs.

name: Perceptual Hash / Near-Duplicate Detection
notes: analyze_perceptual_hashes and near-duplicate lookup exist as registered commands with API wrappers but no UI caller found — dormant. 0 tests in db_core/perceptual_hash.rs.

name: Color Metrics Analysis
notes: analyze_image_colors command with color-progress events and ImageColorMetrics model; no UI caller found — dormant. 0 tests in db_core/color.rs. Related color_label enum filter surfaces in RuleBuilder.svelte:23 with no setter in app code.

name: Image Tags (List/Backfill, Info Rail Display)
notes: Tag metadata with backfill_image_tags/list_tags commands, displayed in Preview Display info rail and filterable in smart-collection RuleBuilder. Covered only by preview-display-ui-contract.test.ts mention.

name: Loupe Histogram Overlay
notes: Histogram toggle with its own native View-menu check item (view_loupe_histogram) and mirrored histogram in Preview Display. Tests: histogram-utils.test.ts, loupe-histogram-contract.test.ts.

name: Preview Display Web Stream
notes: HTTP streaming of the Preview Display to other devices, with its own native Web Stream submenu. Security-relevant and distinct from the preview_display window item. Tests: preview-display-web-stream-contract.test.ts and preview-display-web-stream-security-contract.test.ts.
